landing.badge: Le faufale pito sili mo tagata atiaʻe
landing.subtitle: Mea uma e te manaʻomia e faʻaalia ai ou tomai, galuega faatino, ma le poto masani.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Matou te tuʻuina atu mea faigaluega uma e te manaʻomia e tu ese ai mai le motu o tagata ma faʻailoa lau galuega miti.
landing.feature1Desc: Fa'afaigofie ona fa'atulaga au vaega, galuega fa'atino, ma tomai fa'atasi ai ma le matou fa'atonu va'aiga fa'apitoa.
landing.feature2Desc: Filifili mai faʻataʻitaʻiga faʻapitoa faʻapolofesa poʻo le fatuina o lau oe lava foliga tulaga ese.
landing.feature3Desc: Su'e au tagata asiasi, va'ai po'o fea poloketi e sili ona fa'alogoina, ma sili atu.

deleteAccount.title: Ave'ese Tuma'u Fa'amatalaga
deleteAccount.successMessage: Ua uma ona auina atu se imeli e fa'amaonia ai le tapeina o tala.
deleteAccount.errorMessage: Ua le mafai ona lafo le imeli fa'amaonia.
deleteAccount.confirmationMessage: E te mautinoa e te mana'o e tape lau fa'amatalaga tumau?
deleteAccount.warningMessage1: O le ae mauaina se imeli e faʻamaonia ai le tapeina o tala.
deleteAccount.warningMessage2: Afai e faʻamaonia, o faʻamaumauga uma (faʻamaumauga, poloketi, fuainumera) o le a tapeina tumau ma e le mafai ona toe faʻaleleia.

toasts.toastSetup2FAFailed: Ua le mafai ona seti le 2FA. Fa'amolemole toe taumafai.

toasts.toast2FADisabled: Ua fa'aletonu le fa'amaoni e lua.

toasts.toastSessionDisabled: Ua fa'aletonu le mataituina o sauniga.
toasts.toastSetupKeyCopied: Seti ki ua kopi i le laupapa kilipa.

privacy.title: Faiga Fa'alilolilo
privacy.intro: O lenei Faiga Faʻapitoa e faʻamatalaina ai le auala e aoina ai e DevFolio, faʻaoga, ma puipuia au faʻamatalaga patino pe a faʻaogaina a matou auaunaga.
privacy.section1Content: Matou te aoina faʻamatalaga e te tuʻuina saʻo pe a fatuina se teugatupe, fausia se faila, ma faʻafesoʻotaʻi la matou lagolago.
privacy.section2Content: O au faʻamatalaga e faʻaaogaina e faʻagaioi ai, tausia, ma tuʻuina atu foliga oa matou auaunaga, faʻapea foʻi ma fesoʻotaʻiga ma oe e uiga i lau teugatupe poʻo auʻaunaga.
privacy.section3Content: Matou te fa'atinoina faiga saogalemu talafeagai e puipuia ai au fa'amatalaga mai le fa'atagaina, fa'ailoa, po'o le fa'aleagaina.

confirmDeleteAccount.defaultError: Ua le mafai ona tape le tala. Atonu ua uma le fa'ailoga.
confirmDeleteAccount.loadingMessage: Fa'amolemole fa'atali, o lo'o matou fa'agasolo lau talosaga.
confirmDeleteAccount.successMessage: O au fa'amatalaga uma ua tape'a tumau. O le a toe fa'afeiloa'i oe...
confirmDeleteAccount.errorTitle: Ua le mafai ona Ave'esea Fa'amatalaga

forgotPassword.otpSentToEmail: O le OTP code ua lafo i lau imeli.
forgotPassword.emailThirdParty: O lenei imeli e resitalaina e ala i se isi vaega.
forgotPassword.genericError: E iai se mea sese. Fa'amolemole toe taumafai.
forgotPassword.otpVerified: Ua fa'amaonia lelei le fa'ailoga OTP.
forgotPassword.otpExpired: O le OTP code ua uma. Fa'amolemole talosaga mo se code fou.
forgotPassword.otpResent: Ua lafoina se code OTP fou i lau imeli.
forgotPassword.otpResendFailed: Ua le mafai ona toe lafo le OTP code. Fa'amolemole toe taumafai.
forgotPassword.passwordResetSuccess: Ua manuia le toe setiina o upu faataga. Fa'amolemole saini i totonu ma lau password fou.
forgotPassword.passwordResetFailed: Ua le mafai ona toe setiina le upu faataga.
forgotPassword.title: Ua galo le upu faataga
forgotPassword.description: Ulufale i le tuatusi imeli ua lesitala i lau teugatupe. O le a matou lafoina se OTP code e toe setiina ai le upu faataga.
forgotPassword.verifyOtpDesc: Ulufale le 6 numera numera na lafo i lau imeli e faʻamaonia ai lou faʻamatalaga.
forgotPassword.newPasswordDesc: Fausia se upu fou ma malosi e fa'amautu ai lau teugatupe.
forgotPassword.resettingPassword: Toe setiina o le upu faataga...

verifyEmail.resendError: Ua le mafai ona toe auina atu imeli fa'amaonia. Fa'amolemole toe taumafai.
verifyEmail.title: Siaki lau Email
verifyEmail.description: Ua matou lafoina se imeli faʻamaonia i lau tuatusi imeli. Fa'amolemole tatala le imeli ma kiliki le <1>"Confirm Account"</1> fa'amau e fa'agaoioi ai lau tala.
verifyEmail.step1: Tatala lau talosaga imeli (Gmail, Yahoo, ma isi)
verifyEmail.step2: Vaavaai mo se imeli mai DevFolio ma le mataupu "Account Activation"
verifyEmail.step3: Kiliki le "Confirm Account" button i le imeli
verifyEmail.step4: O le a faasino atu oe i le itulau e saini e ulufale ai
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Ua toe lafo le imeli fa'amaonia!
verifyEmail.resendButton: Toe auina atu le imeli Faamaonia
verifyEmail.footerNote: E le'i mauaina le imeli? Siaki le <1>Spam</1> po'o le <2>Junk</2> faila i lau imeli. Ole so'oga fa'amaonia e aoga mo <3>24 itula</3>.
